name: environmental_health_clinical_trial_cedar_st_lt
premise: A Environmental Health response desk is in a fast-moving incident involving environmental health clinical trial cedar st lt. Key inputs conflict, but the decision deadline is before the press briefing. Every delay increases harm prevention and accountability. Stakeholders are already framing this as short term vs long term under pressure. A live dashboard is public; inconsistencies will trigger immediate investigation. Constraints: Keep public statements strictly factual; label assumptions. Preserve evidence under audit and litigation-hold.

agents.name: Gideon Chandra
agents.identity: I am Gideon Chandra, accountable for a defensible call in Environmental Health when time is collapsing.
agents.goal: I want to reduce immediate harm without locking in an unjust precedent that later betrays long term for short term.

agents.name: Inez Rahman
agents.identity: I am Inez Rahman, tasked with surfacing second-order harms and who bears the risk in Environmental Health.
agents.goal: I want guardrails so long term isn’t quietly traded away under urgency in the name of short term.

choices: I will take a narrow, time-boxed action with immediate human override and impact checks, accepting slower stabilization to protect long term.
I will take a broad, immediate action to stabilize fast and measure impact after deployment, accepting higher risk to long term to secure short term under the deadline.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The deadline is before the press briefing. Evidence is partial. Gideon Chandra must decide under short term vs long term. What does Gideon Chandra do?
